common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

children.data: The data metrics of shop performance.

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

children.description: The number of metrics that did not meet target under Fulfillment Performance type.

children.description: The number of metrics that did not meet target under Customer Service Performance type.
children.name: custom_service_failed

children.description:
Type of metric: 

Fulfillment Performance = 1

Listing Performance = 2

Customer Service Performance = 3
children.name: metric_type

children.description:
ID of metric.

If metric_id < 0, it means that this is not a real metric, but a group of metrics.


Non-Responded Chats = -1

Late Shipment Rate (All Channels) = 1

Non-Fulfilment Rate (All Channels) = 3

Preparation Time = 4

Chat Response Rate = 11

Pre-order Listing % = 12

Days of Pre-order Listing Violation = 15

Response Time = 21

Shop Rating = 22

No. of Non-Responded Chats = 23

Fast Handover Rate = 25

On-time Pickup Failure Rate = 27

On-time Pickup Failure Rate Violation Value = 28

Average Response Time = 29

Cancellation Rate (All Channels) = 42

Return-refund Rate (All Channels) = 43

Severe Listing Violations = 52

Other Listing Violations = 53

Prohibited Listings = 54

Counterfeit/IP infringement = 55

Spam Listings = 56

Late Shipment Rate (NDD) = 85

Non-fulfilment Rate (NDD) = 88

Cancellation Rate (NDD) = 91

Return-refund Rate (NDD) = 92

Customer Satisfaction = 95

% SDD Listings = 96

% NDD Listings = 97

Fast Handover Rate - SLS = 2001

Fast Handover Rate - FBS = 2002

Fast Handover Rate - 3PF = 2003

Poor Quality Products = 2011

% HD Listings = 2030

% HD Free Shipping Enabled = 2031

Saturday Shipment = 2032
Preparation Time PS = 2033

OTDR Logistic Rate = 2036

OTDR DD Rate = 2037
children.name: metric_id

children.description: The performance of the metric at current period.
children.name: current_period

children.description: The performance of the metric at last period.
children.name: last_period

children.description:
(Only for whitelist TW sellers) The exemption_end_date value will not be empty if ALL conditions are met: 

- The shop is in the "POL Shop Whitelist"

- Within the "Exemption Period"

- The metric_id is 12 (Pre-order Listing %) or 15 (Days of Pre-order Listing Violation)
children.name: exemption_end_date

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/account_health/get_shop_performance?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

update_log_list.content: Add "% HD Listings" and "% HD Free Shipping Enabled" metrics
